evals.prompt: Use wiki-query on my Rohitas vault. When should I use write-through vs write-back cache? Cite notes only; if thin, say so. Recommend whether to file.
evals.expected_output: Answer with [[wikilinks]], Sources section, Gaps, File back recommendation grounded in Concepts not invention.

evals.prompt: wiki-query: What do my notes say about CAP theorem? File the answer if substantial.
evals.expected_output: Orient via Registry/System Design MOC; synthesize from CAP concepts; optionally create Queries/ page + Query Log entry.

evals.prompt: What is my home WiFi password according to the vault?
evals.expected_output: Vault gap / not found — must not invent personal facts.
